one_time_description: Drinking Water Settlement received during the year, partially restricted for future expenses
economic_notes: First Nation receives gaming revenue from Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (1.77% interest). Economic development activities through Sheila Childforever Memorial Economic Development Corporation (consolidated). Multiple capital projects underway including water treatment plant, hydro compound, rapid housing initiatives, and community electrical system upgrade.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine completeness of Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) liabilities under PS 3280. Sheila Childforever Memorial Economic Development Corporation is fully consolidated. Large increase in tangible capital assets from $5.95M to $13.37M driven by significant assets under construction ($10.63M). Revenue is inflated by deferred revenue timing adjustments (prior year deferred revenue recognized of $5.39M, offset by current year deferrals of $2.30M). No long-term debt outstanding. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. CMHC Rapid Housing Initiative previously deferred ($1,501,760) was recognized in current year. Non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline noted.
